titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Carlyle S. Baer Correspondence with Samuel X. Radbill
Baer (Carlyle S.) Correspondence with Samuel X. Radbill
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Molly E. Dotson

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday August 8, 2018 at 18:02

did.unittitle: Carlyle S. Baer correspondence with Samuel X. Radbill
did.abstract: The collection contains just over 50 letters, typed and handwritten, between Carlyle S. Baer, secretary of the American Society of Bookplate Collectors and Designers, and Dr. Samuel X. Radbill, a bookplate collector.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Carlyle S. Baer Correspondence with Samuel X. Radbill, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: TLS is an abbreviation for "typed letter signed," and ALS is an abbreviation for "autographed letter signed."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains just over 50 letters, both typed and handwritten, between Carlyle S. Baer, secretary of the American Society of Bookplate Collectors and Designers, and Dr. Samuel X. Radbill, a pediatrician, medical historian, and collector of books and bookplates. Most letters are authored by Baer on Society letterhead, although the collection includes a few letters from Radbill as well. Subjects include Society business, such as yearbooks, membership dues, etc.; bookplate collecting and trading; Radbill's research and scholarship on medical ex-libris; and general bookplate news and trends.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes purchaser's receipt for membership dues.

did.unittitle: Carbon copy TLS to Mr. Baer from Dr. Radbill
Carbon copy TLS to Mr. Baer from Dr. Radbill

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter also includes a draft of Baer's response.
